betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Spark & Stellar Flux§f

§aTwo exotic byproducts of advanced particle acceleration and fusion — essential for late-game crafting!§f

§6Spark§f
§bSpark§f (sparkticle) is an exotic particle created in the particle accelerator. It is a key ingredient for the §bSparkticle Capsule§f, which is itself used to produce dineutronium and other endgame materials.

§bSparkticle Production§f:
Sparkticle Capsules are produced in the particle accelerator:
Recipe: §bPulverized Enchantment§f + §bStrange Quark Capsule§f @ §e12,500 momentum§f
→ Sparkticle Capsule + Dust (waste byproduct)

The Strange Quark itself requires Dark Matter + Muon @ §e12,500 momentum§f, making sparkticles one of the most expensive PA products.

§bUses§f:
§b• §bDineutronium§f — Sparkticle + Ferric Schrabidate in Exposure Chamber
§b• §bSpark Blend§f — used in various high-tier recipes

§6Stellar Flux§f
§bStellar Flux§f is a gaseous antimatter byproduct of the §bICF Reactor§f. It is a vital ingredient for forging §bHeavy Duty Elements§f, which are required for Gerald The Construction Android and some plasma forge recipes.

§bProduction§f:
Stellar flux is produced passively by the ICF reactor based on the formula:
§bQ = E × 10^-11§f
Where Q = flux rate in mB/t, E = reactor energy in TU

The reactor stores up to §e24,000 mB§f of stellar flux.

§bUses§f:
§b• §bHeavy Duty Elements§f — forged in the plasma forge
§b• §bGerald The Construction Android§f — requires heavy duty elements

§eTip§f: Stellar flux production is proportional to ICF heat. Run your ICF at higher power levels for faster flux generation. You'll need significant stellar flux reserves before attempting Gerald construction.
